args.instruction: A coach just returned a set of Boxing Gloves. We now have 20 on the shelf. Update the inventory — but only if this change actually brings us above the restock threshold.

checks.query: SELECT quantity FROM items WHERE sku='SKU001'
SELECT available FROM items WHERE sku='SKU001'

args.instruction: Training Pads are being pulled from the floor for inspection. Mark them unavailable.

args.instruction: Alice Johnson just resolved a member inquiry. Log it into the database.
